case_title: JEREMIAH NYARIBO VS. WILLIAM E KIMATHI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO APR-29-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JEREMIAH NYARIBO. DEFENDANT WILLIAM DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/21/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RTN TO SEND."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $275.00. SERVED FEB-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIMATHI, WILLIAM E
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMATHI, WILLIAM E
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON MAY 2, 2019. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RTN TO SEND."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY NYARIBO, JEREMIAH AS TO DEFENDANT KIMATHI, WILLIAM E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JEREMIAH NYARIBO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM E. KIMATHI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION REFUSES TO ENTER ANY JUDGEMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM KIMATHI ON THE GROUNDS THAT COURT HAS NO JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT WILLIAM KIMATHI BECAUSE HE WAS SERVED IN THE STATE OF MARYLAND.
ORDER RE: CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING.
DECLARATION UPDATE OF ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NYARIBO, JEREMIAH
